svg.style: fill:none; stroke:none; fill-rule:evenodd; clip-rule:evenodd; stroke-linecap:round; stroke-linejoin:round; stroke-miterlimit:1.5;

text.style: font-size:25px; font-family:'Roboto', napkin-fallback, sans-serif; font-weight:bold; white-space:pre;
